name: Country Fried Chicken Steak with Cream Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade: In a large bowl, combine the meat with water, salt, and vinegar. Marinate for 2 hours.
2. Season the flour mixture: In a plastic bag, mix flour and pepper. Add meat piece by piece, shaking to coat thoroughly.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or large skillet to 350°F (175°C). Fry meat in batches until light brown, about 30 seconds per side. Drain on paper towels and place on an oiled platter tented with foil.
4. Make the gravy: Pour off all but 2 tablespoons of oil, leaving browned bits. In a medium saucepan, whisk flour into remaining oil for 3 minutes, scraping up browned bits. Remove from heat and gradually whisk in milk. Stir in salt and continue to whisk until thickened, about 1 minute.
5. Serve: Spoon gravy over steaks just before serving and garnish with parsley.
